display_text: Chen Aghanim's Scepter: Hand of God — Counters heavy magic damage and debuff effects by providing debuff immunity and 60% magic resistance to nearby allies during the channel. This transforms Chen into a teamfight sustain machine, enabling prolonged engagements and high-ground defense.
search_text: Chen Aghanim Scepter Hand of God anti-magic debuff immunity magic resistance teamfight sustain

display_text: Chen Aghanim's Shard: Holy Persuasion — Counters map control limitations by allowing Chen to dominate Ancient creeps, significantly increasing his pushing and teamfight potential. This upgrade shifts Chen's role into a late-game power unit with access to high-tier neutral abilities.
search_text: Chen Aghanim Shard Holy Persuasion Ancient creeps map control teamfight pushing
